WHAT WE STAND FOR

Three commitments behind every placement.

Excellence

Vetted, not volume.

Every candidate is evaluated against the specific role, not funneled through a generic pipeline. We place professionals who can perform from week one.

Partnership

The founder answers the phone.

You're not routed through account managers or ticketing systems. When something needs attention, you reach the person who built the company.

Growth

Built for annual, not transactional.

We structure engagements as ongoing partnerships, not one-off placement fees — because the businesses we work best with are the ones we grow alongside.

HOW IT WORKS

From first call to your new hire's first day.

01

Discovery Call

We learn your role, workflows, and what "great" actually looks like for your business — not a generic job description.

02

Candidate Matching

We identify and vet candidates against your specific requirements, not a pre-built shortlist.

03

Placement in 5 Business Days

Your candidate is ready to start — with the 60-day replacement guarantee backing the match.

04

Ongoing Partnership

We stay involved after placement — because retention, not just placement, is how we measure success.

Proxima Global Solutions is proudly registered with the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) and the Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR), demonstrating our commitment to professionalism, legal compliance, transparency, and long-term business partnerships.

Jerod "Rod" GonzalesFounder & CEO, Proxima Global Solutions
"I started Proxima Global Solutions because I've been on both sides of this — building operations for companies that outsourced badly, and fixing what generic staffing left behind. Every placement we make, I'm personally accountable for. That's not a tagline. It's how the company is actually built."
